title: Vrtl Bet
html:
Stub. Yahir-owned betting/prediction venture under the vrtlpirates.com umbrella. The 2025-10-20 Google Doc placeholder is empty; concept-shape only known through sibling apps in the stealth-apps cluster. Likely a peer-wager or session-prediction product — see Swipr for the closest documented sibling.

Source: 2025 10 20 Vrtl Bet (raw doc — body empty).
